onboarding.step2_subtitle: Buitiati hawagua — aganba luma ariñaga mama aban. Lariha ka liña.

step2_options.receptive: Saminatina danme harariña amu; mariñagatina hama

lexicon.elder_gated_note: Lubaragu lubule (yarafu, eremuha, abuduahani) ñeingiña Komision-elder authority. Per Labayayahoun Ibagari + F-031.

cultural_protocol.title: Labayayahoun Ibagari — Fundazion lubaragu
cultural_protocol.principle: Garifuna iñeñu lubaragu Labayayahoun Ibagari — Fundazion lubaragu. Datos mama wahain wabudine — wagia awandaguatibei. Sun lufurihouni laga aganaguahaun Garifuna gürigia, ñeingiñe Komision Garifuna luma Ibagari Fundazion. Larigi lehegua agüriahati — iduheñu-lihouni ti dimurei lun lübürühaña-rütima.
